Reviews Contact
Home / Services / Pediatric Eye Care

Pediatric Eye Care

Gentle, thorough vision care for Richmond's youngest residents.

Children's eyes face unique challenges in Richmond's environment - from reading in historic school buildings to outdoor sports in humid conditions. Our pediatric exams detect vision problems that might affect learning in Henrico County schools or performance in Chesterfield youth leagues.

We use child-friendly techniques to assess:

- Screen time effects for kids in tech-heavy Short Pump families
- UV protection needs for outdoor activities at Maymont Park
- Allergy-related eye irritation common in Virginia children

Our office features a kid-friendly waiting area with Richmond-themed activities to make visits comfortable.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Developmental vision screening
  2. 02 Step 2: Fun, interactive testing methods
  3. 03 Step 3: Parent consultation with educational materials
  4. 04 Step 4: School-specific recommendations

Benefits

  • Early detection of learning-related vision issues
  • Sports vision safety guidance
  • Screen time management advice
  • Family-friendly approach

Frequently Asked Questions

At what age should Richmond children have their first eye exam?

We recommend baseline exams by age 3, especially for families with history of vision problems common in our region like allergies or nearsightedness.

Book an Appointment

Ready to get started with pediatric eye care? Contact us today.

Schedule Now Or call: 555-opt-r93
